textByHashes.3c6073911be3bf2593bb81334dfbf9df433739d6: Hi. We are in charge of this practice area.
textByHashes.16eca4ac34968633b2eb80ea147e44d69efede2d: Surrounding us are four towers. Each tower contains trained archers of a different level. You'll notice it's quite a distance, so you'll need a longbow.
textByHashes.a4afa2c78239c38ac0a8331083f952e7ed587435: As you're not very skilled, so I advise you to practise on the north tower. That'll provide the best challenge for you.
textByHashes.4b97329092ea39d5a9c538e20246397096b934fd: You seem to have some skill, so I advise you to practice on the east tower. That'll provide the best challenge for you.
textByHashes.a48271f5fd6262f77b77b4bf92274a25fbf7ef03: You appear to be fairly skilled with a bow, so I advise you to practice on the south tower. That'll provide the best challenge for you.
textByHashes.4567e9f794badb49709ae38825f7d4118ee8b367: Looks like you're very skilled, so I advise you to practice on the west tower. That'll provide the best challenge for you.
textByHashes.91f525f9ed85cc01f7e1efaa78a404041188fa68: The north tower is occupied, get them!
textByHashes.ee631e408508d417dcf747c6d60ca030f468bf78: The east tower is occupied, get them!
textByHashes.ea9bad3a624f5714c851563196a2b22be84e2d19: The south tower is occupied, get them!
textByHashes.fbb35584f59903372ad4aa30063b3f86ba23be72: The west tower is occupied, get them!
textByHashes.bc65b217f475e48dce69a573a8a28fac9ca3bb24: The north tower is defeated! Hurray!
textByHashes.7fee1c7a4bc204f08e4917aef4482c7c8faf17fc: The east tower is defeated! Hurray!
textByHashes.5903c6423f766763c68c110adc0b3262f5c9fafa: The south tower is defeated! Hurray!
textByHashes.c6f5f8fe706dcebefaa3c9756aeb8edc484c36a4: The west tower is defeated! Hurray!
textByHashes.9bcfe7f4f4b7a458659330b916e623314803e10d: The north tower has received reinforcements, kill them quickly!
textByHashes.b59f152561cdf9d044d4b6668dbfcf977de4c18d: The east tower has received reinforcements, kill them quickly!
textByHashes.24a374ba72b76e7ea25d9c5d102d7f77a6239eec: The south tower has received reinforcements, kill them quickly!
textByHashes.41b0a72d6a0f9c48ef16e89e05cb4a224e7991c4: The west tower has received reinforcements, kill them quickly!
